selection_summary.selection_strategy: Manually curated composite-step stress subset. Prioritizes step_by_step jobs whose source excerpts contain adjacent procedures, branchy neighboring subgoals, or fragile goal-closing steps that are easy to over-merge or over-scope. Adds four stable non-step controls to detect spillover.
composite_step_hypotheses: adjacent documented procedures in one source section
branching subgoals such as add/remove/modify or import/merge/overwrite
fragile final goal state that can drift into a nearby but different dialog or follow-up path

selection_notes.jaws_de_teacher_wave_v1::train::step_by_: Known residual blocker: one section carries both opening Stimmeneinstellungen and separate Stimmenprofil selection.
selection_notes.jaws_de_teacher_wave_v1::eval::step_by_s: User wording asks for add/remove while excerpt foregrounds installation; tests one-sided scope drift.
Example procedure can drift from virtualization into copying/sending follow-up actions.
selection_notes.jaws_de_teacher_wave_v1::train::step_by_: Procedure branches between speech and braille devices plus add/remove/modify subgoals.
Installation flow ends with setup completion, restart, and later usability; tests clean goal closure.
Nested flow opens one dialog from another and requires saving/closing both without losing scope.
Import from previous version includes destructive warning confirmation and result dialog; tests final-state handling.
Import assistant contains multiple stages and later branch points around merge behavior.
Resetting a preset voice profile uses delete-then-reselect; easy to confuse restoration target.
